description: Leading the integration of a new tech stack, enabling the team to deliver a wider range of innovative projects.
Managing the end-to-end project lifecycle from client requirement gathering to deployment.
Ensuring project progress and timely delivery by implementing Agile methodologies and leading daily Scrum calls.
Developed a comprehensive Python pipeline for high-precision single-molecule localization analysis, including 2D Gaussian fitting and drift correction.
Authored a standard operating procedure for a prism-type Total Internal Reflection Fluorescence (pTIRF) microscope.
Gained proficiency in operating and analyzing data from UV-Vis, Photoluminescence, and XRD spectrometers.
Operated Bruker Alpha-II compact FTIR Spectrometer, Double Beam Spectrometer (UV3200), and Keithley's 2450 Source Meter.
Conducted polymer synthesis, distillation of chemicals, and high-temperature two-probe setup measurements.
Performed Gaussian calculations and studied molecular structure using Gaussian09 and IMMM computational facility.
Handled customer issues related to domain, hosting, and websites.
Troubleshot website errors and provided support for hosting services.
